Please explain the overall architecture and purpose of the current project.

## Project: Personal Finance Analyzer

### Purpose
A full-stack web application for personal expense management with:
- **Receipt scanning** via OCR (upload → extract → review → save)
- **Transaction management** (auto-categorized from receipts)
- **Dashboard analytics** (spending trends, category breakdown)
- **Budget tracking** with alerts
- **AI-generated insights** from financial summaries

---

### Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Frontend (Next.js 15)                  │
│  React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind + TanStack Query         │
└──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │ REST API
┌──────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Backend API (FastAPI)                      │
│  Pydantic + SQLModel + PostgreSQL + Redis                  │
│  └── Services, Repositories, Domain Rules                  │
└──────────┬─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────┘
           │                     │
    ┌──────▼──────┐      ┌──────▼──────┐
    │  PostgreSQL │      │    Redis    │
    │  (metadata) │      │  (cache/    │
    └─────────────┘      │   queue)    │
                         └──────┬──────┘
                                │
                    ┌───────────▼───────────┐
                    │    Worker (TaskIQ)    │
                    │  - OCR processing     │
                    │  - Analytics refresh  │
                    │  - AI insight gen     │
                    └───────────┬───────────┘
                                │
              ┌─────────────────┼─────────────────┐
              │                 │                 │
       ┌──────▼──────┐  ┌──────▼──────┐  ┌──────▼──────┐
       │   MinIO     │  │  OCR Engine │  │  LLM (AI)   │
       │ (storage)   │  │ (PaddleOCR) │  │ (Gemini/    │
       └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  │  Ollama)    │
                                          └─────────────┘
```

---

### Key Components

| Component | Tech | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| **Frontend** | Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript | UI, auth flows, upload, dashboard |
| **Backend API** | FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLModel | REST endpoints, business logic |
| **Worker** | TaskIQ + Redis | Async jobs (OCR, analytics, AI) |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL 16 | Persistent data |
| **Cache/Queue** | Redis 7 | Session cache, job queue |
| **Object Storage** | MinIO (local) / S3 (prod) | Receipt images |
| **OCR** | PaddleOCR (local) / Google Vision | Text extraction |
| **AI** | Ollama (local) / Gemini (cloud) | Insight generation |

---

### Current Status

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| Foundation (infra, db) | ✅ Complete |
| Auth (register/login/session) | ✅ Complete |
| Receipt upload + OCR baseline | ✅ Complete |
| Transactions CRUD | 🔲 Pending |
| Dashboard analytics | 🔲 Pending |
| Budgets | 🔲 Pending |
| AI insights | 🔲 Pending |

---

### Summary

This is a **modern monorepo** with a clear separation between frontend, backend API, background worker, and shared code. The architecture is designed for:
- Independent scaling (frontend/backend/worker)
- Async processing (receipt OCR doesn't block requests)
- Flexible AI/OCR providers (local or cloud)
- Clean domain boundaries (no business logic in UI)

1: # Personal Finance Analyzer
2: 
3: Monorepo cho ung dung quan ly chi tieu ca nhan, gom frontend, backend API, worker va local infrastructure.
4: 
5: ## Repository Structure
6: 
7: - `frontend/web`: Web app (Next.js)
8: - `backend/api`: FastAPI service
9: - `backend/worker`: Background worker
10: - `backend/shared`: Shared Python package dung chung cho API/worker
11: - `infra/docker`: Dockerfiles va local container setup
12: - `docs`: Tai lieu du an
13: 
14: ## Local Run (Current)
15: 
16: Trang thai hien tai da chay duoc:
17: - Frontend (Next.js)
18: - Backend API (FastAPI)
19: - Worker (TaskIQ + Redis)
20: - Local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO)
21: - Auth flow (register/login/logout/me)
22: - Receipt upload flow + polling status + OCR mock baseline
23: 
24: ### One-shot (Copy 1 Block)
25: 
26: Chay block sau trong PowerShell tai root repo `D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer`.
27: Block nay se:
28: - up local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO),
29: - mo 3 terminal rieng cho API, worker, frontend,
30: - in ra URL de check nhanh.
31: 
32: ```powershell
33: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer"
34: 
35: # 1) Start infra
36: Set-Location "infra\docker"
37: docker compose up -d
38: Set-Location "..\.."
39: 
40: # 2) Start API in new terminal
41: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
42: 	"-NoExit",
43: 	"-Command",
44: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
45: )
46: 
47: # 3) Start worker in new terminal
48: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
49: 	"-NoExit",
50: 	"-Command",
51: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker' worker_app:broker"
52: )
53: 
54: # 4) Start frontend in new terminal
55: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
56: 	"-NoExit",
57: 	"-Command",
58: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web'; pnpm install; pnpm dev"
59: )
60: 
61: Write-Host "Infra/API/Worker/Frontend are starting..."
62: Write-Host "API health: http://127.0.0.1:8000/health"
63: Write-Host "Frontend : http://localhost:3000"
64: Write-Host "API docs : http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs"
65: ```
66: 
67: ### 1) Prerequisites
68: 
69: - Node.js 20+
70: - pnpm
71: - Python 3.12+
72: - uv (hoac su dung `python -m uv`)
73: - Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon)
74: 
75: ### 2) Run Backend API
76: 
77: PowerShell:
78: 
79: ```powershell
80: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api"
81: python -m uv sync --all-groups
82: python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
83: ```
84: 
85: Neu ban muon chay tu bat ky thu muc nao (an toan hon), dung lenh nay:
86: 
87: ```powershell
88: python -m uv run uvicorn --app-dir "D:/VuLapTrinh2/Personal_Finance_Analyzer/backend/api" app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
89: ```
90: 
91: Kiem tra health:
92: 
93: ```powershell
94: Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health"
95: ```
96: 
97: Expected:
98: 
99: ```json
100: {"status":"ok","service":"api"}
101: ```
102: 
103: ### 2.1) Run Local Infra
104: 
105: Luu y: can mo Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon) truoc khi chay command.
106: 
107: PowerShell:
108: 
109: ```powershell
110: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\infra\docker"
111: docker compose up -d
112: docker compose ps
113: ```
114: 
115: Services:
116: - PostgreSQL: `localhost:5432`
117: - Redis: `localhost:6379`
118: - MinIO API: `http://localhost:9000`
119: - MinIO Console: `http://localhost:9001`
120: 
121: MinIO default credentials:
122: - username: `minioadmin`
123: - password: `minioadmin`
124: 
125: Bucket `pfa-receipts` duoc tao tu dong boi init service `minio-init`.
126: 
127: Kiem tra nhanh init logs:
128: 
129: ```powershell
130: docker compose logs minio-init
131: ```
132: 
133: Dung local infra:
134: 
135: ```powershell
136: docker compose down
137: ```
138: 
139: ### 3) Run Frontend
140: 
141: Mo terminal khac, chay:
142: 
143: ```powershell
144: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web"
145: pnpm install
146: pnpm dev
147: ```
148: 
149: Mo trinh duyet:
150: - Frontend home: http://localhost:3000
151: - Frontend health page: http://localhost:3000/health
152: - Frontend login page: http://localhost:3000/login
153: - Frontend register page: http://localhost:3000/register
154: - Frontend dashboard (protected): http://localhost:3000/dashboard
155: - Frontend receipt upload: http://localhost:3000/receipts/upload
156: - Backend API docs: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
157: 
158: ### 4) Run Worker
159: 
160: Can Redis chay tai `localhost:6379`.
161: 
162: PowerShell:
163: 
164: ```powershell
165: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker"
166: python -m uv sync --all-groups
167: python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker" worker_app:broker
168: ```
169: 
170: Mo terminal khac de ban demo task:
171: 
172: ```powershell
173: python -m uv run --project "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker" python "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker\run_ping.py"
174: ```
175: 
176: Expected output:
177: 
178: ```text
179: ping
180: ```
181: 
182: ### 5) Test Commands
183: 
184: #### Frontend
185: 
186: ```powershell
187: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web"
188: pnpm lint
189: pnpm build
190: ```
191: 
192: #### Backend API
193: 
194: ```powershell
195: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api"
196: python -m uv sync --all-groups
197: python -m uv run ruff check app tests
198: python -m uv run mypy app
199: python -m uv run pytest
200: ```
201: 
202: #### Backend Worker
203: 
204: ```powershell
205: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker"
206: python -m uv sync --all-groups
207: python -m uv run ruff check . tests
208: python -m uv run mypy .
209: python -m uv run pytest
210: ```
211: 
212: ### 6) Quick Manual Test (Auth + Receipt Upload)
213: 
214: 1. Start infra, API, frontend (va worker neu muon OCR queue consume).
215: 2. Mo `http://localhost:3000/register`, tao tai khoan moi.
216: 3. Dang nhap o `http://localhost:3000/login`.
217: 4. Vao `http://localhost:3000/receipts/upload`, upload file JPG/PNG/PDF.
218: 5. Xac nhan UI hien trang thai `uploading -> processing -> ready/failed`.
219: 6. Neu failed/timeout, kiem tra fallback manual-entry message tren UI.
220: 
221: ### 7) Environment Files
222: 
223: Copy env examples thanh `.env` (neu can custom gia tri local):
224: 
225: - `frontend/web/.env.example`
226: - `backend/api/.env.example`
227: - `backend/worker/.env.example`
228: 
229: ### 8) Common Pitfall
230: 
231: - Neu chay uvicorn trong `backend/api/app` voi `main:app` se de loi import.
232: - Cach dung: chay tu `backend/api` voi `app.main:app` nhu lenh o tren.
233: - Khong dung `uv run uvicorn main:app --reload` trong `backend/api/app`.
234: 
235: ## Current Status
236: 
237: - [x] Phase 0: Foundation
238: - [x] Phase 1: Auth and session
239: - [x] Phase 2: Receipt upload and OCR pipeline baseline
240:

1: ## Ghi chú định hướng
2: Tài liệu gốc mô tả khá rõ các khối hệ thống bắt buộc như web app, backend API, OCR processing, analytics summary, AI insight service, database, object storage, queue worker và cache. Vì vậy stack dưới đây được tối ưu theo mục tiêu:
3: - dễ cho AI đọc và sinh code,
4: - triển khai local nhanh,
5: - scale tách riêng frontend/backend/worker,
6: - giữ chi phí OCR và AI linh hoạt theo từng môi trường.
7: 
8: ## Kết luận kiến trúc được chọn
9: - **Frontend**: Next.js 15 + TypeScript.
10: - **Backend API**: FastAPI + Pydantic + SQLModel.
11: - **Worker**: TaskIQ ưu tiên, Celery là fallback nếu cần hệ sinh thái lớn hơn.
12: - **Queue/Broker/Cache**: Redis 7.x.
13: - **Database**: PostgreSQL 16.x.
14: - **Storage**: MinIO local, S3-compatible ở production.
15: - **OCR**: adapter interface, ưu tiên PaddleOCR; EasyOCR là fallback; Google Vision là dự phòng cloud.
16: - **AI Insight**: ưu tiên gọi trực tiếp provider adapter để đơn giản; chỉ dùng LangChain khi thật sự cần multi-provider workflow phức tạp.
17: 
18: ---
19: 
20: ## Ngôn ngữ và Runtime
21: 
22: ### Backend
23: - **Python**: `3.12+`
24: - Lý do:
25:   - Type hints giúp AI sinh code và refactor tốt hơn.
26:   - FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLModel, pytest, Ruff tạo thành hệ sinh thái cực hợp cho vibecoding.
27:   - Dễ tích hợp OCR/LLM worker.
28: 
29: ### Frontend
30: - **TypeScript**: `5.6.x`
31: - **Node.js**: `20 LTS` hoặc `22 LTS` nếu team đã kiểm thử ổn với Next.js 15.
32: - Ghi chú:
33:   - Với bài toán này, mình nghiêng mạnh về **Next.js + TypeScript** hơn là frontend Python như Reflex, vì dashboard, upload flow, interactive tables và charting sẽ linh hoạt hơn.
34:   - Reflex chỉ nên cân nhắc nếu team muốn all-Python tuyệt đối và chấp nhận trade-off về hệ sinh thái frontend.
35: 
36: ### Package Manager
37: - **Python package manager**: `uv`
38: - **Frontend package manager**: `pnpm` hoặc `npm`; ưu tiên `pnpm` nếu repo lớn, còn `npm` là đủ cho MVP.
39: - Nhận định:
40:   - `uv` là lựa chọn rất tốt cho Python và Docker build.
41:   - Không nên ép frontend cũng dùng uv; frontend vẫn nên dùng package manager JavaScript chuẩn.
42: 
43: ---
44: 
45: ## Frontend
46: 
47: ### Framework
48: - **Next.js**: `15.x` (App Router)
49: - **React**: `19.x`
50: - **TypeScript**: strict mode = `true`
51: 
52: ### Styling
53: - **Tailwind CSS**: `3.4.x`
54: 
55: ### State Management / Data Fetching
56: - **Ưu tiên**: `TanStack Query` cho server-state

... [truncated: 1,905 chars omitted] ...

111: 
112: ---
113: 
114: ## Worker / Queue
115: 
116: ### Task Queue
117: - **Ưu tiên**: `TaskIQ`
118: - **Fallback**: `Celery`
119: 
120: ### Broker / Cache
121: - **Redis**: `7.x`
122: 
123: ### Job Types
124: - `process_ocr_job`: trích xuất dữ liệu từ ảnh receipt.
125: - `refresh_analytics_job`: recompute cache/summary sau khi transaction thay đổi.
126: - `generate_insight_job`: gọi LLM hoặc rule engine tạo insight.
127: 
128: ### Khuyến nghị lựa chọn
129: - Dùng **TaskIQ** cho MVP nếu muốn codebase hiện đại, gọn, async-native và gần FastAPI hơn.
130: - Chuyển sang **Celery** chỉ khi cần scheduling/phân tán/phụ trợ phức tạp hơn hoặc team đã quen Celery.
131: 
132: ---
133: 
134: ## Database & Storage
135: 
136: ### Database
137: - **PostgreSQL**: `16.x`
138: 
139: ### Storage
140: - **Local**: `MinIO`
141: - **Production**: `S3-compatible storage`
142: 
143: ### Quy ước lưu trữ
144: - Receipt image lưu object storage.
145: - DB chỉ lưu metadata, status, extracted text, normalized payload, transaction records, budget records, insight snapshots.
146: - Không lưu raw image trong database.
147: 
148: ---
149: 
150: ## OCR Processing
151: 
152: ### Kiến trúc OCR
153: - Tạo interface: `OCRProvider`
154: - Các method gợi ý:
155:   - `extract_text(file_path: str) -> OCRRawResult`
156:   - `normalize_receipt(raw: OCRRawResult) -> OCRNormalizedReceipt`
157: 
158: ### Provider local
159: - **Ưu tiên**: `PaddleOCR`
160: - **Fallback**: `EasyOCR`
161: 
162: ### Cloud provider dự phòng
163: - **Google Vision API**
164: 
165: ### Nhận định kỹ thuật
166: - PaddleOCR thường hợp hơn cho pipeline OCR nghiêm túc, nhưng nặng hơn trong môi trường local nhỏ.
167: - EasyOCR dễ thử nghiệm nhanh hơn nhưng độ ổn định có thể kém hơn tùy ngôn ngữ/chất lượng ảnh.
168: - Với MVP, nên làm theo 3 bước:
169:   1. mock OCR provider,
170:   2. local OCR provider,
171:   3. cloud fallback provider.
172: 
173: ---
174: 
175: ## LLM / AI Insight
176: 
177: ### Mục tiêu
178: AI không đọc ảnh thô, mà đọc structured financial summary hoặc transaction aggregates.
179: 
180: ### Provider / Library
181: - **Ưu tiên kiến trúc**: custom provider adapter mỏng
182: - **Local brain**: `Ollama` (Llama 3 hoặc Qwen 2.5 qua local API)
183: - **Cloud brain tiết kiệm**: Google Generative AI SDK cho Gemini
184: - **LangChain hoặc Haystack**:
185:   - chỉ dùng khi cần workflow chaining, prompt templates nhiều tầng, tracing hay provider abstraction phức tạp.
186: 
187: ### Khuyến nghị thực tế
188: - Cho MVP, **không nên bắt đầu bằng LangChain/Haystack**.
189: - Nên bắt đầu bằng:
190:   - prompt templates lưu file markdown/yaml,
191:   - Pydantic structured output parser,
192:   - provider adapters riêng cho Ollama/Gemini.
193: - Khi luồng insight đủ phức tạp mới cân nhắc thêm LangChain.
194: 
195: ### Output contract
196: - Bắt buộc structured JSON/Pydantic schema.
197: - Có timeout, retry, cache theo `user_id + time_range + data_fingerprint`.
198: - Có fallback rule-based insight khi LLM lỗi.
199: 
200: ---
201: 
202: ## Testing & Quality
203: 
204: ### Test
205: - **Unit/Integration**: `pytest`
206: - **API contract/integration**: `httpx`, `pytest-asyncio`
207: - **Frontend E2E**: `Playwright`
208: 
209: ### Lint / Format
210: - **Ruff**
211: - Ghi chú:
212:   - Ruff có thể thay phần lớn Flake8 + isort và nhiều rule lint khác.
213:   - Nếu cần format, dùng thêm `ruff format` là đủ trong đa số trường hợp.
214: 
215: ### Type Check
216: - **mypy**
217: 
218: ### Frontend quality
219: - **ESLint** đi kèm Next.js
220: - **Prettier** optional; nếu team muốn ít tool hơn có thể chỉ giữ ESLint + quy ước code style rõ ràng.
221: 
222: ---
223: 
224: ## Observability
225: 
226: ### Logging
227: - Python logging chuẩn hoặc `structlog`

350: - Mỗi dependency phải trả lời được:
351:   1. giải quyết vấn đề gì,
352:   2. có thể thay bằng built-in không,
353:   3. có làm tăng lock-in không,
354:   4. có tăng bundle/runtime cost không,
355:   5. AI có thể bảo trì/refactor nó ổn không.

360: - Save transaction <= 1s.
361: - AI summary <= 5s sau khi summary data sẵn sàng.
362: - OCR và AI phải degrade gracefully khi provider lỗi.
363: - Frontend, API và Worker có thể scale độc lập.

316: 2. Backend API lưu metadata + object storage path.
317: 3. Backend API enqueue `process_ocr_job`.
318: 4. Worker gọi OCR provider và chuẩn hóa kết quả thành draft.
319: 5. Frontend lấy draft để user review/chỉnh sửa.
320: 6. User lưu transaction.
321: 7. Backend ghi transaction + enqueue `refresh_analytics_job`.
322: 8. Dashboard summary được recompute/cache trong Redis hoặc DB snapshot.
323: 9. Backend enqueue hoặc gọi `generate_insight_job` từ summary data.

329: - Worker không quyết định UI state; chỉ cập nhật processing state và output chuẩn hóa.
330: - AI insight chỉ đọc summary data hoặc structured transaction data, không đọc raw image trực tiếp.
331: - Business rules nằm ở backend domain/service layer, không nằm trong component UI.
332: 
333: ## Thứ tự ưu tiên khi triển khai
334: 1. Foundation + infra local.
335: 2. Backend auth + frontend auth flow.
336: 3. Receipt upload + OCR draft.
337: 4. Transaction CRUD.
338: 5. Dashboard summary.
339: 6. Budget.
340: 7. AI insights.
341: 8. Hardening, observability, UAT.

parts.content: Now I have a comprehensive understanding of this project. Let me summarize the architecture and purpose.

## Project: Personal Finance Analyzer

### Purpose
A full-stack web application for personal expense management with:
- **Receipt scanning** via OCR (upload → extract → review → save)
- **Transaction management** (auto-categorized from receipts)
- **Dashboard analytics** (spending trends, category breakdown)
- **Budget tracking** with alerts
- **AI-generated insights** from financial summaries

---

### Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Frontend (Next.js 15)                  │
│  React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind + TanStack Query         │
└──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │ REST API
┌──────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Backend API (FastAPI)                      │
│  Pydantic + SQLModel + PostgreSQL + Redis                  │
│  └── Services, Repositories, Domain Rules                  │
└──────────┬─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────┘
           │                     │
    ┌──────▼──────┐      ┌──────▼──────┐
    │  PostgreSQL │      │    Redis    │
    │  (metadata) │      │  (cache/    │
    └─────────────┘      │   queue)    │
                         └──────┬──────┘
                                │
                    ┌───────────▼───────────┐
                    │    Worker (TaskIQ)    │
                    │  - OCR processing     │
                    │  - Analytics refresh  │
                    │  - AI insight gen     │
                    └───────────┬───────────┘
                                │
              ┌─────────────────┼─────────────────┐
              │                 │                 │
       ┌──────▼──────┐  ┌──────▼──────┐  ┌──────▼──────┐
       │   MinIO     │  │  OCR Engine │  │  LLM (AI)   │
       │ (storage)   │  │ (PaddleOCR) │  │ (Gemini/    │
       └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  │  Ollama)    │
                                          └─────────────┘
```

---

### Key Components

| Component | Tech | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| **Frontend** | Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript | UI, auth flows, upload, dashboard |
| **Backend API** | FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLModel | REST endpoints, business logic |
| **Worker** | TaskIQ + Redis | Async jobs (OCR, analytics, AI) |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL 16 | Persistent data |
| **Cache/Queue** | Redis 7 | Session cache, job queue |
| **Object Storage** | MinIO (local) / S3 (prod) | Receipt images |
| **OCR** | PaddleOCR (local) / Google Vision | Text extraction |
| **AI** | Ollama (local) / Gemini (cloud) | Insight generation |

---

### Current Status

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| Foundation (infra, db) | ✅ Complete |
| Auth (register/login/session) | ✅ Complete |
| Receipt upload + OCR baseline | ✅ Complete |
| Transactions CRUD | 🔲 Pending |
| Dashboard analytics | 🔲 Pending |
| Budgets | 🔲 Pending |
| AI insights | 🔲 Pending |

---

### Summary

This is a **modern monorepo** with a clear separation between frontend, backend API, background worker, and shared code. The architecture is designed for:
- Independent scaling (frontend/backend/worker)
- Async processing (receipt OCR doesn't block requests)
- Flexible AI/OCR providers (local or cloud)
- Clean domain boundaries (no business logic in UI)

1: # Personal Finance Analyzer
2: 
3: Monorepo cho ung dung quan ly chi tieu ca nhan, gom frontend, backend API, worker va local infrastructure.
4: 
5: ## Repository Structure
6: 
7: - `frontend/web`: Web app (Next.js)
8: - `backend/api`: FastAPI service
9: - `backend/worker`: Background worker
10: - `backend/shared`: Shared Python package dung chung cho API/worker
11: - `infra/docker`: Dockerfiles va local container setup
12: - `docs`: Tai lieu du an
13: 
14: ## Local Run (Current)
15: 
16: Trang thai hien tai da chay duoc:
17: - Frontend (Next.js)
18: - Backend API (FastAPI)
19: - Worker (TaskIQ + Redis)
20: - Local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO)
21: - Auth flow (register/login/logout/me)
22: - Receipt upload flow + polling status + OCR mock baseline
23: 
24: ### One-shot (Copy 1 Block)
25: 
26: Chay block sau trong PowerShell tai root repo `D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer`.
27: Block nay se:
28: - up local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO),
29: - mo 3 terminal rieng cho API, worker, frontend,
30: - in ra URL de check nhanh.
31: 
32: ```powershell
33: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer"
34: 
35: # 1) Start infra
36: Set-Location "infra\docker"
37: docker compose up -d
38: Set-Location "..\.."
39: 
40: # 2) Start API in new terminal
41: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
42: 	"-NoExit",
43: 	"-Command",
44: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
45: )
46: 
47: # 3) Start worker in new terminal
48: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
49: 	"-NoExit",
50: 	"-Command",
51: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker' worker_app:broker"
52: )
53: 
54: # 4) Start frontend in new terminal
55: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
56: 	"-NoExit",
57: 	"-Command",
58: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web'; pnpm install; pnpm dev"
59: )
60: 
61: Write-Host "Infra/API/Worker/Frontend are starting..."
62: Write-Host "API health: http://127.0.0.1:8000/health"
63: Write-Host "Frontend : http://localhost:3000"
64: Write-Host "API docs : http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs"
65: ```
66: 
67: ### 1) Prerequisites
68: 
69: - Node.js 20+
70: - pnpm
71: - Python 3.12+
72: - uv (hoac su dung `python -m uv`)
73: - Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon)
74: 
75: ### 2) Run Backend API
76: 
77: PowerShell:
78: 
79: ```powershell
80: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api"
81: python -m uv sync --all-groups
82: python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
83: ```
84: 
85: Neu ban muon chay tu bat ky thu muc nao (an toan hon), dung lenh nay:
86: 
87: ```powershell
88: python -m uv run uvicorn --app-dir "D:/VuLapTrinh2/Personal_Finance_Analyzer/backend/api" app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
89: ```
90: 
91: Kiem tra health:
92: 
93: ```powershell

95: ```
96: 
97: Expected:
98: 
99: ```json
100: {"status":"ok","service":"api"}
101: ```
102: 
103: ### 2.1) Run Local Infra
104: 
105: Luu y: can mo Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon) truoc khi chay command.
106: 
107: PowerShell:
108: 
109: ```powershell

111: docker compose up -d

115: Services:
116: - PostgreSQL: `localhost:5432`
117: - Redis: `localhost:6379`
118: - MinIO API: `http://localhost:9000`
119: - MinIO Console: `http://localhost:9001`
120: 
121: MinIO default credentials:
122: - username: `minioadmin`
123: - password: `minioadmin`
124: 
125: Bucket `pfa-receipts` duoc tao tu dong boi init service `minio-init`.
126: 
127: Kiem tra nhanh init logs:
128: 
129: ```powershell
130: docker compose logs minio-init
131: ```
132: 
133: Dung local infra:
134: 
135: ```powershell
136: docker compose down
137: ```
138: 
139: ### 3) Run Frontend
140: 
141: Mo terminal khac, chay:
142: 
143: ```powershell
144: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web"
145: pnpm install

148: 
149: Mo trinh duyet:
150: - Frontend home: http://localhost:3000
151: - Frontend health page: http://localhost:3000/health
152: - Frontend login page: http://localhost:3000/login
153: - Frontend register page: http://localhost:3000/register
154: - Frontend dashboard (protected): http://localhost:3000/dashboard
155: - Frontend receipt upload: http://localhost:3000/receipts/upload
156: - Backend API docs: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
157: 
158: ### 4) Run Worker
159: 
160: Can Redis chay tai `localhost:6379`.
161: 
162: PowerShell:
163: 
164: ```powershell
165: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker"
166: python -m uv sync --all-groups
167: python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker" worker_app:broker
168: ```
169: 
170: Mo terminal khac de ban demo task:
171: 
172: ```powershell
173: python -m uv run --project "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker" python "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker\run_ping.py"
174: ```
175: 
176: Expected output:
177: 
178: ```text
179: ping
180: ```
181: 
182: ### 5) Test Commands
183: 
184: #### Frontend
185: 
186: ```powershell
187: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web"
188: pnpm lint
189: pnpm build
190: ```
191: 
192: #### Backend API
193: 
194: ```powershell
195: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api"
196: python -m uv sync --all-groups
197: python -m uv run ruff check app tests
198: python -m uv run mypy app
199: python -m uv run pytest
200: ```
201: 
202: #### Backend Worker
203: 
204: ```powershell
205: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker"
206: python -m uv sync --all-groups
207: python -m uv run ruff check . tests
208: python -m uv run mypy .
209: python -m uv run pytest
210: ```
211: 
212: ### 6) Quick Manual Test (Auth + Receipt Upload)
213: 
214: 1. Start infra, API, frontend (va worker neu muon OCR queue consume).
215: 2. Mo `http://localhost:3000/register`, tao tai khoan moi.
216: 3. Dang nhap o `http://localhost:3000/login`.
217: 4. Vao `http://localhost:3000/receipts/upload`, upload file JPG/PNG/PDF.
218: 5. Xac nhan UI hien trang thai `uploading -> processing -> ready/failed`.
219: 6. Neu failed/timeout, kiem tra fallback manual-entry message tren UI.
220: 
221: ### 7) Environment Files
222: 
223: Copy env examples thanh `.env` (neu can custom gia tri local):
224: 
225: - `frontend/web/.env.example`
226: - `backend/api/.env.example`
227: - `backend/worker/.env.example`
228: 
229: ### 8) Common Pitfall
230: 
231: - Neu chay uvicorn trong `backend/api/app` voi `main:app` se de loi import.
232: - Cach dung: chay tu `backend/api` voi `app.main:app` nhu lenh o tren.
233: - Khong dung `uv run uvicorn main:app --reload` trong `backend/api/app`.
234: 
235: ## Current Status
236: 
237: - [x] Phase 0: Foundation
238: - [x] Phase 1: Auth and session
239: - [x] Phase 2: Receipt upload and OCR pipeline baseline

1: ## Ghi chú định hướng
2: Tài liệu gốc mô tả khá rõ các khối hệ thống bắt buộc như web app, backend API, OCR processing, analytics summary, AI insight service, database, object storage, queue worker và cache. Vì vậy stack dưới đây được tối ưu theo mục tiêu:
3: - dễ cho AI đọc và sinh code,
4: - triển khai local nhanh,
5: - scale tách riêng frontend/backend/worker,
6: - giữ chi phí OCR và AI linh hoạt theo từng môi trường.
7: 
8: ## Kết luận kiến trúc được chọn
9: - **Frontend**: Next.js 15 + TypeScript.
10: - **Backend API**: FastAPI + Pydantic + SQLModel.
11: - **Worker**: TaskIQ ưu tiên, Celery là fallback nếu cần hệ sinh thái lớn hơn.
12: - **Queue/Broker/Cache**: Redis 7.x.
13: - **Database**: PostgreSQL 16.x.
14: - **Storage**: MinIO local, S3-compatible ở production.
15: - **OCR**: adapter interface, ưu tiên PaddleOCR; EasyOCR là fallback; Google Vision là dự phòng cloud.
16: - **AI Insight**: ưu tiên gọi trực tiếp provider adapter để đơn giản; chỉ dùng LangChain khi thật sự cần multi-provider workflow phức tạp.
17: 
18: ---
19: 
20: ## Ngôn ngữ và Runtime
21: 
22: ### Backend
23: - **Python**: `3.12+`
24: - Lý do:
25:   - Type hints giúp AI sinh code và refactor tốt hơn.
26:   - FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLModel, pytest, Ruff tạo thành hệ sinh thái cực hợp cho vibecoding.
27:   - Dễ tích hợp OCR/LLM worker.
28: 
29: ### Frontend
30: - **TypeScript**: `5.6.x`
31: - **Node.js**: `20 LTS` hoặc `22 LTS` nếu team đã kiểm thử ổn với Next.js 15.
32: - Ghi chú:
33:   - Với bài toán này, mình nghiêng mạnh về **Next.js + TypeScript** hơn là frontend Python như Reflex, vì dashboard, upload flow, interactive tables và charting sẽ linh hoạt hơn.
34:   - Reflex chỉ nên cân nhắc nếu team muốn all-Python tuyệt đối và chấp nhận trade-off về hệ sinh thái frontend.
35: 
36: ### Package Manager
37: - **Python package manager**: `uv`
38: - **Frontend package manager**: `pnpm` hoặc `npm`; ưu tiên `pnpm` nếu repo lớn, còn `npm` là đủ cho MVP.
39: - Nhận định:
40:   - `uv` là lựa chọn rất tốt cho Python và Docker build.
41:   - Không nên ép frontend cũng dùng uv; frontend vẫn nên dùng package manager JavaScript chuẩn.
42: 
43: ---
44: 
45: ## Frontend
46: 
47: ### Framework
48: - **Next.js**: `15.x` (App Router)
49: - **React**: `19.x`
50: - **TypeScript**: strict mode = `true`
51: 
52: ### Styling
53: - **Tailwind CSS**: `3.4.x`
54: 
55: ### State Management / Data Fetching
56: - **Ưu tiên**: `TanStack Query` cho server-state

... [truncated: 1,905 chars omitted] ...

111: 
112: ---
113: 
114: ## Worker / Queue
115: 
116: ### Task Queue
117: - **Ưu tiên**: `TaskIQ`
118: - **Fallback**: `Celery`
119: 
120: ### Broker / Cache
121: - **Redis**: `7.x`
122: 
123: ### Job Types
124: - `process_ocr_job`: trích xuất dữ liệu từ ảnh receipt.
125: - `refresh_analytics_job`: recompute cache/summary sau khi transaction thay đổi.
126: - `generate_insight_job`: gọi LLM hoặc rule engine tạo insight.
127: 
128: ### Khuyến nghị lựa chọn
129: - Dùng **TaskIQ** cho MVP nếu muốn codebase hiện đại, gọn, async-native và gần FastAPI hơn.
130: - Chuyển sang **Celery** chỉ khi cần scheduling/phân tán/phụ trợ phức tạp hơn hoặc team đã quen Celery.
131: 
132: ---
133: 
134: ## Database & Storage
135: 
136: ### Database
137: - **PostgreSQL**: `16.x`
138: 
139: ### Storage
140: - **Local**: `MinIO`
141: - **Production**: `S3-compatible storage`
142: 
143: ### Quy ước lưu trữ
144: - Receipt image lưu object storage.
145: - DB chỉ lưu metadata, status, extracted text, normalized payload, transaction records, budget records, insight snapshots.
146: - Không lưu raw image trong database.
147: 
148: ---
149: 
150: ## OCR Processing
151: 
152: ### Kiến trúc OCR
153: - Tạo interface: `OCRProvider`
154: - Các method gợi ý:
155:   - `extract_text(file_path: str) -> OCRRawResult`
156:   - `normalize_receipt(raw: OCRRawResult) -> OCRNormalizedReceipt`
157: 
158: ### Provider local
159: - **Ưu tiên**: `PaddleOCR`
160: - **Fallback**: `EasyOCR`
161: 
162: ### Cloud provider dự phòng
163: - **Google Vision API**
164: 
165: ### Nhận định kỹ thuật
166: - PaddleOCR thường hợp hơn cho pipeline OCR nghiêm túc, nhưng nặng hơn trong môi trường local nhỏ.
167: - EasyOCR dễ thử nghiệm nhanh hơn nhưng độ ổn định có thể kém hơn tùy ngôn ngữ/chất lượng ảnh.
168: - Với MVP, nên làm theo 3 bước:
169:   1. mock OCR provider,
170:   2. local OCR provider,
171:   3. cloud fallback provider.
172: 
173: ---
174: 
175: ## LLM / AI Insight
176: 
177: ### Mục tiêu
178: AI không đọc ảnh thô, mà đọc structured financial summary hoặc transaction aggregates.
179: 
180: ### Provider / Library
181: - **Ưu tiên kiến trúc**: custom provider adapter mỏng
182: - **Local brain**: `Ollama` (Llama 3 hoặc Qwen 2.5 qua local API)
183: - **Cloud brain tiết kiệm**: Google Generative AI SDK cho Gemini
184: - **LangChain hoặc Haystack**:
185:   - chỉ dùng khi cần workflow chaining, prompt templates nhiều tầng, tracing hay provider abstraction phức tạp.
186: 
187: ### Khuyến nghị thực tế
188: - Cho MVP, **không nên bắt đầu bằng LangChain/Haystack**.
189: - Nên bắt đầu bằng:
190:   - prompt templates lưu file markdown/yaml,
191:   - Pydantic structured output parser,
192:   - provider adapters riêng cho Ollama/Gemini.
193: - Khi luồng insight đủ phức tạp mới cân nhắc thêm LangChain.
194: 
195: ### Output contract
196: - Bắt buộc structured JSON/Pydantic schema.
197: - Có timeout, retry, cache theo `user_id + time_range + data_fingerprint`.
198: - Có fallback rule-based insight khi LLM lỗi.
199: 
200: ---
201: 
202: ## Testing & Quality
203: 
204: ### Test
205: - **Unit/Integration**: `pytest`
206: - **API contract/integration**: `httpx`, `pytest-asyncio`
207: - **Frontend E2E**: `Playwright`
208: 
209: ### Lint / Format
210: - **Ruff**
211: - Ghi chú:
212:   - Ruff có thể thay phần lớn Flake8 + isort và nhiều rule lint khác.
213:   - Nếu cần format, dùng thêm `ruff format` là đủ trong đa số trường hợp.
214: 
215: ### Type Check
216: - **mypy**
217: 
218: ### Frontend quality
219: - **ESLint** đi kèm Next.js
220: - **Prettier** optional; nếu team muốn ít tool hơn có thể chỉ giữ ESLint + quy ước code style rõ ràng.
221: 
222: ---
223: 
224: ## Observability
225: 
226: ### Logging
227: - Python logging chuẩn hoặc `structlog`
228: - Ưu tiên log có correlation id / request id / job id
229: 
230: ### Metrics
231: - `prometheus-client`
232: - Theo dõi:
233:   - OCR latency
234:   - AI latency
235:   - queue depth
236:   - upload failure rate
237:   - API response time
238:   - dashboard cache hit rate
239: 
240: ### Error Tracking
241: - `Sentry` ở phase hardening/release
242: 
243: ---
244: 
245: ## Container & Local Environment
246: 
247: ### Môi trường local đề xuất
248: - Frontend app
249: - FastAPI app
250: - Worker app
251: - PostgreSQL 16
252: - Redis 7
253: - MinIO
254: - Mock hoặc local OCR provider
255: - Mock hoặc local/cloud LLM provider
256: 
257: ### Docker
258: - Docker Engine `26+`
259: - Docker Compose v2
260: - Multi-stage Dockerfiles cho frontend/api/worker
261: 
262: ### Config
263: - `.env`
264: - `.env.example` bắt buộc đầy đủ
265: - Tách nhóm biến: app, auth, db, redis, storage, OCR, LLM, observability
266: 
267: ---
268: 
269: ## Phiên bản đề xuất tóm tắt
270: 
271: ### Backend
272: - Python `3.12+`
273: - FastAPI `0.115+`
274: - Pydantic `2.x`
275: - SQLModel `0.0.x` compatible với SQLAlchemy 2
276: - PostgreSQL `16.x`
277: - Redis `7.x`
278: - TaskIQ `latest stable` hoặc Celery `5.x`
279: - pytest `8.x`
280: - Ruff `0.6+`
281: - mypy `1.x`
282: 
283: ### Frontend
284: - Node.js `20 LTS`
285: - TypeScript `5.6.x`
286: - Next.js `15.x`
287: - React `19.x`
288: - Tailwind CSS `3.4.x`
289: - TanStack Query `5.x`
290: - Playwright `1.5x`
291: 
292: ### AI / OCR
293: - Ollama `latest stable`
294: - Google Generative AI SDK `latest stable`
295: - PaddleOCR hoặc EasyOCR
296: - Google Vision API làm fallback
297: 
298: ---
299: 
300: ## Biến môi trường đề xuất
301: 
302: ### App
303: - `APP_ENV`
304: - `API_V1_PREFIX`
305: - `WEB_URL`
306: - `API_URL`
307: 
308: ### Auth
309: - `JWT_SECRET`
310: - `JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRE_MINUTES`
311: - `JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRE_DAYS`
312: - `SESSION_COOKIE_NAME`

318: - `REDIS_URL`

323: - `S3_BUCKET_PRIVATE`
324: - `S3_ACCESS_KEY`
325: - `S3_SECRET_KEY`

327: ### OCR
328: - `OCR_PROVIDER`
329: - `OCR_TIMEOUT_MS`
330: - `OCR_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB`
331: - `GOOGLE_VISION_API_KEY`

333: ### AI

336: - `LLM_API_KEY`
337: - `LLM_TIMEOUT_MS`
338: - `LLM_MAX_RETRIES`

341: ### Observability

346: ---
347: 
348: ## Dependency rules
349: - Không cài package chỉ để tiện tay.
350: - Mỗi dependency phải trả lời được:
351:   1. giải quyết vấn đề gì,
352:   2. có thể thay bằng built-in không,
353:   3. có làm tăng lock-in không,
354:   4. có tăng bundle/runtime cost không,
355:   5. AI có thể bảo trì/refactor nó ổn không.
356: 
357: ## Tương thích với KPI/NFR
358: - Dashboard first load <= 2s với dưới ngưỡng dữ liệu MVP.
359: - OCR preview <= 8s cho ảnh chuẩn.
360: - Save transaction <= 1s.
361: - AI summary <= 5s sau khi summary data sẵn sàng.
362: - OCR và AI phải degrade gracefully khi provider lỗi.
363: - Frontend, API và Worker có thể scale độc lập.

161: 
162: #### `frontend/web/components`
163: UI components tái sử dụng.
164: - `ui/`: button, input, modal, table, badge, skeleton.
165: - `forms/`: form field, receipt upload form, transaction form, budget form.
166: - `charts/`: wrappers cho chart chi tiêu, budget progress, trend chart.
167: - `layout/`: navbar, sidebar, header, page shell.
168: - `domain/`: receipt card, transaction row, insight card.
169: 
170: #### `frontend/web/features`
171: Tách theo nghiệp vụ.
172: - `auth/`: login/register/session hooks.
173: - `receipts/`: upload, preview, OCR review flow.
174: - `transactions/`: list/filter/create/edit/delete transaction.
175: - `dashboard/`: summary cards, spending trends, category breakdown.
176: - `budgets/`: create/update budget, progress, alerts.
177: - `insights/`: AI insight view, refresh state, feedback actions.
178: 
179: #### `frontend/web/lib`
180: Hạ tầng phía frontend.
181: - `api/`: API client gọi backend.
182: - `hooks/`: reusable hooks.
183: - `utils/`: formatter, parser, date helpers.
184: - `config/`: env parsing, route constants.
185: - `query/`: TanStack Query setup nếu dùng.
186: 
187: #### `frontend/web/providers`
188: Global providers.
189: - Session provider.
190: - Query provider.
191: - Theme/config provider.
192: 
193: ### Backend API
194: 
195: #### `backend/api/app/api/v1`
196: REST endpoints public/internal cho web app.
197: - `auth.py`: đăng ký, đăng nhập, refresh session, logout, me.
198: - `receipts.py`: upload file, lấy trạng thái, lấy OCR draft.
199: - `transactions.py`: CRUD transaction, filter, pagination.
200: - `dashboard.py`: summary, breakdown, trend.
201: - `budgets.py`: CRUD budget, progress, status.
202: - `insights.py`: lấy insight hiện tại, tạo insight mới.
203: 
204: #### `backend/api/app/core`
205: Hạ tầng hệ thống.
206: - `config.py`: settings từ env.
207: - `security.py`: JWT, password hashing, cookie policy.
208: - `database.py`: SQLModel/SQLAlchemy engine, session.
209: - `cache.py`: Redis client.
210: - `logging.py`: logger config và correlation id.
211: 
212: #### `backend/api/app/models`
213: ORM models cho PostgreSQL.
214: - User, ReceiptUpload, OcrResult, Transaction, Category, Budget, InsightSnapshot, UserMerchantMapping.
215: 
216: #### `backend/api/app/schemas`
217: Pydantic schemas vào/ra.
218: - Request/response DTO.
219: - OCR normalized payload.
220: - Insight structured output.
221: 
222: #### `backend/api/app/services`
223: Application service layer.
224: - Auth service.
225: - Receipt upload service.
226: - OCR draft orchestration.
227: - Transaction service.
228: - Dashboard aggregation service.
229: - Budget service.
230: - Insight generation orchestration.
231: 
232: #### `backend/api/app/repositories`
233: Data access layer.
234: - Tách truy vấn DB ra khỏi service.
235: - Giữ query logic phức tạp, aggregation query, transactional writes.
236: 
237: #### `backend/api/app/domain`
238: Pure business rules.
239: - Validation quy tắc budget.
240: - Transaction categorization helper.
241: - Dashboard aggregation logic thuần.
242: - Rule-based fallback cho insight input.
243: 
244: #### `backend/api/app/integrations`
245: Tích hợp ngoài qua adapter.
246: - `storage/`: MinIO/S3 adapter.
247: - `ocr/`: OCRProvider interface + PaddleOCR/EasyOCR/Google Vision adapters.
248: - `llm/`: Ollama/Gemini adapters.
249: 
250: ### Backend Worker
251: 
252: #### `backend/worker/app/jobs`
253: Background job definitions.
254: - `process_ocr_job.py`: trích xuất dữ liệu từ receipt image.
255: - `refresh_analytics_job.py`: recompute summary/cache khi transaction thay đổi.
256: - `generate_insight_job.py`: gọi LLM hoặc rule engine tạo insight snapshot.
257: 
258: #### `backend/worker/app/consumers`
259: Queue handlers, retry policy, dead-letter strategy.
260: 
261: #### `backend/worker/app/services`
262: Logic xử lý nền tách khỏi queue framework.
263: 
264: #### `backend/worker/app/providers`
265: Provider wiring cho OCR, storage, LLM, notification.
266: 
267: ### Shared Backend
268: 
269: #### `backend/shared/domain`
270: Logic nghiệp vụ dùng chung giữa api và worker.
271: 
272: #### `backend/shared/schemas`
273: Schema chuẩn hóa dùng lại để tránh lệch contract.
274: 
275: #### `backend/shared/prompts`
276: Prompt versioning cho normalize OCR và generate insights.
277: 
278: ## Mapping module với functional requirements
279: 
280: ### Auth
281: - `frontend/web/features/auth`
282: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/auth.py`
283: - `backend/api/app/services/auth_service.py`
284: 
285: ### Receipts & OCR
286: - `frontend/web/features/receipts`
287: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/receipts.py`
288: - `backend/api/app/integrations/ocr/`
289: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/process_ocr_job.py`
290: 
291: ### Transactions
292: - `frontend/web/features/transactions`
293: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/transactions.py`
294: - `backend/api/app/services/transaction_service.py`
295: - `backend/shared/domain/transactions.py`
296: 
297: ### Dashboard & Analytics
298: - `frontend/web/features/dashboard`
299: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/dashboard.py`
300: - `backend/api/app/services/dashboard_service.py`
301: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/refresh_analytics_job.py`
302: 
303: ### Budgets
304: - `frontend/web/features/budgets`
305: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/budgets.py`
306: - `backend/api/app/services/budget_service.py`
307: 
308: ### AI Insights
309: - `frontend/web/features/insights`
310: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/insights.py`
311: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/generate_insight_job.py`
312: - `backend/shared/prompts/`
313: 
314: ## Luồng dữ liệu end-to-end
315: 1. User upload receipt ở frontend.
316: 2. Backend API lưu metadata + object storage path.
317: 3. Backend API enqueue `process_ocr_job`.
318: 4. Worker gọi OCR provider và chuẩn hóa kết quả thành draft.
319: 5. Frontend lấy draft để user review/chỉnh sửa.
320: 6. User lưu transaction.
321: 7. Backend ghi transaction + enqueue `refresh_analytics_job`.
322: 8. Dashboard summary được recompute/cache trong Redis hoặc DB snapshot.
323: 9. Backend enqueue hoặc gọi `generate_insight_job` từ summary data.
324: 10. Frontend hiển thị dashboard + insight mới nhất.
325: 
326: ## Boundary quan trọng
327: - Frontend không được gọi OCR/LLM trực tiếp.
328: - Backend API không giữ xử lý OCR/AI nặng trong request lifecycle nếu có thể đẩy sang worker.
329: - Worker không quyết định UI state; chỉ cập nhật processing state và output chuẩn hóa.
330: - AI insight chỉ đọc summary data hoặc structured transaction data, không đọc raw image trực tiếp.
331: - Business rules nằm ở backend domain/service layer, không nằm trong component UI.
332: 
333: ## Thứ tự ưu tiên khi triển khai
334: 1. Foundation + infra local.
335: 2. Backend auth + frontend auth flow.
336: 3. Receipt upload + OCR draft.
337: 4. Transaction CRUD.
338: 5. Dashboard summary.
339: 6. Budget.
340: 7. AI insights.
341: 8. Hardening, observability, UAT.

256: - `generate_insight_job.py`: gọi LLM hoặc rule engine tạo insight snapshot.
257: 
258: #### `backend/worker/app/consumers`
259: Queue handlers, retry policy, dead-letter strategy.
260: 
261: #### `backend/worker/app/services`
262: Logic xử lý nền tách khỏi queue framework.
263: 
264: #### `backend/worker/app/providers`
265: Provider wiring cho OCR, storage, LLM, notification.
266: 
267: ### Shared Backend
268: 
269: #### `backend/shared/domain`
270: Logic nghiệp vụ dùng chung giữa api và worker.
271: 
272: #### `backend/shared/schemas`
273: Schema chuẩn hóa dùng lại để tránh lệch contract.
274: 
275: #### `backend/shared/prompts`
276: Prompt versioning cho normalize OCR và generate insights.
277: 
278: ## Mapping module với functional requirements
279: 
280: ### Auth
281: - `frontend/web/features/auth`
282: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/auth.py`
283: - `backend/api/app/services/auth_service.py`
284: 
285: ### Receipts & OCR
286: - `frontend/web/features/receipts`
287: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/receipts.py`
288: - `backend/api/app/integrations/ocr/`
289: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/process_ocr_job.py`
290: 
291: ### Transactions
292: - `frontend/web/features/transactions`
293: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/transactions.py`
294: - `backend/api/app/services/transaction_service.py`
295: - `backend/shared/domain/transactions.py`
296: 
297: ### Dashboard & Analytics
298: - `frontend/web/features/dashboard`
299: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/dashboard.py`
300: - `backend/api/app/services/dashboard_service.py`
301: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/refresh_analytics_job.py`
302: 
303: ### Budgets
304: - `frontend/web/features/budgets`
305: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/budgets.py`
306: - `backend/api/app/services/budget_service.py`
307: 
308: ### AI Insights
309: - `frontend/web/features/insights`
310: - `backend/api/app/api/v1/insights.py`
311: - `backend/worker/app/jobs/generate_insight_job.py`
312: - `backend/shared/prompts/`
313: 
314: ## Luồng dữ liệu end-to-end
315: 1. User upload receipt ở frontend.
316: 2. Backend API lưu metadata + object storage path.
317: 3. Backend API enqueue `process_ocr_job`.
318: 4. Worker gọi OCR provider và chuẩn hóa kết quả thành draft.
319: 5. Frontend lấy draft để user review/chỉnh sửa.
320: 6. User lưu transaction.
321: 7. Backend ghi transaction + enqueue `refresh_analytics_job`.
322: 8. Dashboard summary được recompute/cache trong Redis hoặc DB snapshot.
323: 9. Backend enqueue hoặc gọi `generate_insight_job` từ summary data.
324: 10. Frontend hiển thị dashboard + insight mới nhất.
325: 
326: ## Boundary quan trọng
327: - Frontend không được gọi OCR/LLM trực tiếp.
328: - Backend API không giữ xử lý OCR/AI nặng trong request lifecycle nếu có thể đẩy sang worker.
329: - Worker không quyết định UI state; chỉ cập nhật processing state và output chuẩn hóa.
330: - AI insight chỉ đọc summary data hoặc structured transaction data, không đọc raw image trực tiếp.
331: - Business rules nằm ở backend domain/service layer, không nằm trong component UI.
332: 
333: ## Thứ tự ưu tiên khi triển khai
334: 1. Foundation + infra local.
335: 2. Backend auth + frontend auth flow.
336: 3. Receipt upload + OCR draft.
337: 4. Transaction CRUD.
338: 5. Dashboard summary.
339: 6. Budget.
340: 7. AI insights.
341: 8. Hardening, observability, UAT.
342:

name: read_file
content:
1: ## Ghi chú định hướng
2: Tài liệu gốc mô tả khá rõ các khối hệ thống bắt buộc như web app, backend API, OCR processing, analytics summary, AI insight service, database, object storage, queue worker và cache. Vì vậy stack dưới đây được tối ưu theo mục tiêu:
3: - dễ cho AI đọc và sinh code,
4: - triển khai local nhanh,
5: - scale tách riêng frontend/backend/worker,
6: - giữ chi phí OCR và AI linh hoạt theo từng môi trường.
7: 
8: ## Kết luận kiến trúc được chọn
9: - **Frontend**: Next.js 15 + TypeScript.
10: - **Backend API**: FastAPI + Pydantic + SQLModel.
11: - **Worker**: TaskIQ ưu tiên, Celery là fallback nếu cần hệ sinh thái lớn hơn.
12: - **Queue/Broker/Cache**: Redis 7.x.
13: - **Database**: PostgreSQL 16.x.
14: - **Storage**: MinIO local, S3-compatible ở production.
15: - **OCR**: adapter interface, ưu tiên PaddleOCR; EasyOCR là fallback; Google Vision là dự phòng cloud.
16: - **AI Insight**: ưu tiên gọi trực tiếp provider adapter để đơn giản; chỉ dùng LangChain khi thật sự cần multi-provider workflow phức tạp.
17: 
18: ---
19: 
20: ## Ngôn ngữ và Runtime
21: 
22: ### Backend
23: - **Python**: `3.12+`
24: - Lý do:
25:   - Type hints giúp AI sinh code và refactor tốt hơn.
26:   - FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLModel, pytest, Ruff tạo thành hệ sinh thái cực hợp cho vibecoding.
27:   - Dễ tích hợp OCR/LLM worker.
28: 
29: ### Frontend
30: - **TypeScript**: `5.6.x`
31: - **Node.js**: `20 LTS` hoặc `22 LTS` nếu team đã kiểm thử ổn với Next.js 15.
32: - Ghi chú:
33:   - Với bài toán này, mình nghiêng mạnh về **Next.js + TypeScript** hơn là frontend Python như Reflex, vì dashboard, upload flow, interactive tables và charting sẽ linh hoạt hơn.
34:   - Reflex chỉ nên cân nhắc nếu team muốn all-Python tuyệt đối và chấp nhận trade-off về hệ sinh thái frontend.
35: 
36: ### Package Manager
37: - **Python package manager**: `uv`
38: - **Frontend package manager**: `pnpm` hoặc `npm`; ưu tiên `pnpm` nếu repo lớn, còn `npm` là đủ cho MVP.
39: - Nhận định:
40:   - `uv` là lựa chọn rất tốt cho Python và Docker build.
41:   - Không nên ép frontend cũng dùng uv; frontend vẫn nên dùng package manager JavaScript chuẩn.
42: 
43: ---
44: 
45: ## Frontend
46: 
47: ### Framework
48: - **Next.js**: `15.x` (App Router)
49: - **React**: `19.x`
50: - **TypeScript**: strict mode = `true`
51: 
52: ### Styling
53: - **Tailwind CSS**: `3.4.x`
54: 
55: ### State Management / Data Fetching
56: - **Ưu tiên**: `TanStack Query` cho server-state

... [truncated: 1,905 chars omitted] ...

111: 
112: ---
113: 
114: ## Worker / Queue
115: 
116: ### Task Queue
117: - **Ưu tiên**: `TaskIQ`
118: - **Fallback**: `Celery`
119: 
120: ### Broker / Cache
121: - **Redis**: `7.x`
122: 
123: ### Job Types
124: - `process_ocr_job`: trích xuất dữ liệu từ ảnh receipt.
125: - `refresh_analytics_job`: recompute cache/summary sau khi transaction thay đổi.
126: - `generate_insight_job`: gọi LLM hoặc rule engine tạo insight.
127: 
128: ### Khuyến nghị lựa chọn
129: - Dùng **TaskIQ** cho MVP nếu muốn codebase hiện đại, gọn, async-native và gần FastAPI hơn.
130: - Chuyển sang **Celery** chỉ khi cần scheduling/phân tán/phụ trợ phức tạp hơn hoặc team đã quen Celery.
131: 
132: ---
133: 
134: ## Database & Storage
135: 
136: ### Database
137: - **PostgreSQL**: `16.x`
138: 
139: ### Storage
140: - **Local**: `MinIO`
141: - **Production**: `S3-compatible storage`
142: 
143: ### Quy ước lưu trữ
144: - Receipt image lưu object storage.
145: - DB chỉ lưu metadata, status, extracted text, normalized payload, transaction records, budget records, insight snapshots.
146: - Không lưu raw image trong database.
147: 
148: ---
149: 
150: ## OCR Processing
151: 
152: ### Kiến trúc OCR
153: - Tạo interface: `OCRProvider`
154: - Các method gợi ý:
155:   - `extract_text(file_path: str) -> OCRRawResult`
156:   - `normalize_receipt(raw: OCRRawResult) -> OCRNormalizedReceipt`
157: 
158: ### Provider local
159: - **Ưu tiên**: `PaddleOCR`
160: - **Fallback**: `EasyOCR`
161: 
162: ### Cloud provider dự phòng
163: - **Google Vision API**
164: 
165: ### Nhận định kỹ thuật
166: - PaddleOCR thường hợp hơn cho pipeline OCR nghiêm túc, nhưng nặng hơn trong môi trường local nhỏ.
167: - EasyOCR dễ thử nghiệm nhanh hơn nhưng độ ổn định có thể kém hơn tùy ngôn ngữ/chất lượng ảnh.
168: - Với MVP, nên làm theo 3 bước:
169:   1. mock OCR provider,
170:   2. local OCR provider,
171:   3. cloud fallback provider.
172: 
173: ---
174: 
175: ## LLM / AI Insight
176: 
177: ### Mục tiêu
178: AI không đọc ảnh thô, mà đọc structured financial summary hoặc transaction aggregates.
179: 
180: ### Provider / Library
181: - **Ưu tiên kiến trúc**: custom provider adapter mỏng
182: - **Local brain**: `Ollama` (Llama 3 hoặc Qwen 2.5 qua local API)
183: - **Cloud brain tiết kiệm**: Google Generative AI SDK cho Gemini
184: - **LangChain hoặc Haystack**:
185:   - chỉ dùng khi cần workflow chaining, prompt templates nhiều tầng, tracing hay provider abstraction phức tạp.
186: 
187: ### Khuyến nghị thực tế
188: - Cho MVP, **không nên bắt đầu bằng LangChain/Haystack**.
189: - Nên bắt đầu bằng:
190:   - prompt templates lưu file markdown/yaml,
191:   - Pydantic structured output parser,
192:   - provider adapters riêng cho Ollama/Gemini.
193: - Khi luồng insight đủ phức tạp mới cân nhắc thêm LangChain.
194: 
195: ### Output contract
196: - Bắt buộc structured JSON/Pydantic schema.
197: - Có timeout, retry, cache theo `user_id + time_range + data_fingerprint`.
198: - Có fallback rule-based insight khi LLM lỗi.
199: 
200: ---
201: 
202: ## Testing & Quality
203: 
204: ### Test
205: - **Unit/Integration**: `pytest`
206: - **API contract/integration**: `httpx`, `pytest-asyncio`
207: - **Frontend E2E**: `Playwright`
208: 
209: ### Lint / Format
210: - **Ruff**
211: - Ghi chú:
212:   - Ruff có thể thay phần lớn Flake8 + isort và nhiều rule lint khác.
213:   - Nếu cần format, dùng thêm `ruff format` là đủ trong đa số trường hợp.
214: 
215: ### Type Check
216: - **mypy**
217: 
218: ### Frontend quality
219: - **ESLint** đi kèm Next.js
220: - **Prettier** optional; nếu team muốn ít tool hơn có thể chỉ giữ ESLint + quy ước code style rõ ràng.
221: 
222: ---
223: 
224: ## Observability
225: 
226: ### Logging
227: - Python logging chuẩn hoặc `structlog`
228: - Ưu tiên log có correlation id / request id / job id
229: 
230: ### Metrics
231: - `prometheus-client`
232: - Theo dõi:
233:   - OCR latency
234:   - AI latency
235:   - queue depth
236:   - upload failure rate
237:   - API response time
238:   - dashboard cache hit rate
239: 
240: ### Error Tracking
241: - `Sentry` ở phase hardening/release
242: 
243: ---
244: 
245: ## Container & Local Environment
246: 
247: ### Môi trường local đề xuất
248: - Frontend app
249: - FastAPI app
250: - Worker app
251: - PostgreSQL 16
252: - Redis 7
253: - MinIO
254: - Mock hoặc local OCR provider
255: - Mock hoặc local/cloud LLM provider
256: 
257: ### Docker
258: - Docker Engine `26+`
259: - Docker Compose v2
260: - Multi-stage Dockerfiles cho frontend/api/worker
261: 
262: ### Config
263: - `.env`
264: - `.env.example` bắt buộc đầy đủ
265: - Tách nhóm biến: app, auth, db, redis, storage, OCR, LLM, observability
266: 
267: ---
268: 
269: ## Phiên bản đề xuất tóm tắt
270: 
271: ### Backend
272: - Python `3.12+`
273: - FastAPI `0.115+`
274: - Pydantic `2.x`
275: - SQLModel `0.0.x` compatible với SQLAlchemy 2
276: - PostgreSQL `16.x`
277: - Redis `7.x`
278: - TaskIQ `latest stable` hoặc Celery `5.x`
279: - pytest `8.x`
280: - Ruff `0.6+`
281: - mypy `1.x`
282: 
283: ### Frontend
284: - Node.js `20 LTS`
285: - TypeScript `5.6.x`
286: - Next.js `15.x`
287: - React `19.x`
288: - Tailwind CSS `3.4.x`
289: - TanStack Query `5.x`
290: - Playwright `1.5x`
291: 
292: ### AI / OCR
293: - Ollama `latest stable`
294: - Google Generative AI SDK `latest stable`
295: - PaddleOCR hoặc EasyOCR
296: - Google Vision API làm fallback
297: 
298: ---
299: 
300: ## Biến môi trường đề xuất
301: 
302: ### App
303: - `APP_ENV`
304: - `API_V1_PREFIX`
305: - `WEB_URL`
306: - `API_URL`
307: 
308: ### Auth
309: - `JWT_SECRET`
310: - `JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRE_MINUTES`
311: - `JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRE_DAYS`
312: - `SESSION_COOKIE_NAME`
313: - `SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE`
314: - `SESSION_COOKIE_SAMESITE`
315: 
316: ### Database / Cache
317: - `DATABASE_URL`
318: - `REDIS_URL`
319: 
320: ### Storage
321: - `S3_ENDPOINT`
322: - `S3_REGION`
323: - `S3_BUCKET_PRIVATE`
324: - `S3_ACCESS_KEY`
325: - `S3_SECRET_KEY`
326: 
327: ### OCR
328: - `OCR_PROVIDER`
329: - `OCR_TIMEOUT_MS`
330: - `OCR_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB`
331: - `GOOGLE_VISION_API_KEY`
332: 
333: ### AI
334: - `LLM_PROVIDER`
335: - `LLM_MODEL`
336: - `LLM_API_KEY`
337: - `LLM_TIMEOUT_MS`
338: - `LLM_MAX_RETRIES`
339: - `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`
340: 
341: ### Observability
342: - `LOG_LEVEL`
343: - `SENTRY_DSN`
344: - `PROMETHEUS_ENABLED`
345: 
346: ---
347: 
348: ## Dependency rules
349: - Không cài package chỉ để tiện tay.
350: - Mỗi dependency phải trả lời được:
351:   1. giải quyết vấn đề gì,
352:   2. có thể thay bằng built-in không,
353:   3. có làm tăng lock-in không,
354:   4. có tăng bundle/runtime cost không,
355:   5. AI có thể bảo trì/refactor nó ổn không.
356: 
357: ## Tương thích với KPI/NFR
358: - Dashboard first load <= 2s với dưới ngưỡng dữ liệu MVP.
359: - OCR preview <= 8s cho ảnh chuẩn.
360: - Save transaction <= 1s.
361: - AI summary <= 5s sau khi summary data sẵn sàng.
362: - OCR và AI phải degrade gracefully khi provider lỗi.
363: - Frontend, API và Worker có thể scale độc lập.

content:
1: # Personal Finance Analyzer
2: 
3: Monorepo cho ung dung quan ly chi tieu ca nhan, gom frontend, backend API, worker va local infrastructure.
4: 
5: ## Repository Structure
6: 
7: - `frontend/web`: Web app (Next.js)
8: - `backend/api`: FastAPI service
9: - `backend/worker`: Background worker
10: - `backend/shared`: Shared Python package dung chung cho API/worker
11: - `infra/docker`: Dockerfiles va local container setup
12: - `docs`: Tai lieu du an
13: 
14: ## Local Run (Current)
15: 
16: Trang thai hien tai da chay duoc:
17: - Frontend (Next.js)
18: - Backend API (FastAPI)
19: - Worker (TaskIQ + Redis)
20: - Local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO)
21: - Auth flow (register/login/logout/me)
22: - Receipt upload flow + polling status + OCR mock baseline
23: 
24: ### One-shot (Copy 1 Block)
25: 
26: Chay block sau trong PowerShell tai root repo `D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer`.
27: Block nay se:
28: - up local infra (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO),
29: - mo 3 terminal rieng cho API, worker, frontend,
30: - in ra URL de check nhanh.
31: 
32: ```powershell
33: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer"
34: 
35: # 1) Start infra
36: Set-Location "infra\docker"
37: docker compose up -d
38: Set-Location "..\.."
39: 
40: # 2) Start API in new terminal
41: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
42: 	"-NoExit",
43: 	"-Command",
44: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
45: )
46: 
47: # 3) Start worker in new terminal
48: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
49: 	"-NoExit",
50: 	"-Command",
51: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker'; python -m uv sync --all-groups; python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker' worker_app:broker"
52: )
53: 
54: # 4) Start frontend in new terminal
55: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @(
56: 	"-NoExit",
57: 	"-Command",
58: 	"Set-Location 'D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web'; pnpm install; pnpm dev"
59: )
60: 
61: Write-Host "Infra/API/Worker/Frontend are starting..."
62: Write-Host "API health: http://127.0.0.1:8000/health"
63: Write-Host "Frontend : http://localhost:3000"
64: Write-Host "API docs : http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs"
65: ```
66: 
67: ### 1) Prerequisites
68: 
69: - Node.js 20+
70: - pnpm
71: - Python 3.12+
72: - uv (hoac su dung `python -m uv`)
73: - Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon)
74: 
75: ### 2) Run Backend API
76: 
77: PowerShell:
78: 
79: ```powershell
80: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\api"
81: python -m uv sync --all-groups
82: python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
83: ```
84: 
85: Neu ban muon chay tu bat ky thu muc nao (an toan hon), dung lenh nay:
86: 
87: ```powershell
88: python -m uv run uvicorn --app-dir "D:/VuLapTrinh2/Personal_Finance_Analyzer/backend/api" app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
89: ```
90: 
91: Kiem tra health:
92: 
93: ```powershell
94: Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health"
95: ```
96: 
97: Expected:
98: 
99: ```json
100: {"status":"ok","service":"api"}
101: ```
102: 
103: ### 2.1) Run Local Infra
104: 
105: Luu y: can mo Docker Desktop (hoac Docker daemon) truoc khi chay command.
106: 
107: PowerShell:
108: 
109: ```powershell
110: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\infra\docker"
111: docker compose up -d
112: docker compose ps
113: ```
114: 
115: Services:
116: - PostgreSQL: `localhost:5432`
117: - Redis: `localhost:6379`
118: - MinIO API: `http://localhost:9000`
119: - MinIO Console: `http://localhost:9001`
120: 
121: MinIO default credentials:
122: - username: `minioadmin`
123: - password: `minioadmin`
124: 
125: Bucket `pfa-receipts` duoc tao tu dong boi init service `minio-init`.
126: 
127: Kiem tra nhanh init logs:
128: 
129: ```powershell
130: docker compose logs minio-init
131: ```
132: 
133: Dung local infra:
134: 
135: ```powershell
136: docker compose down
137: ```
138: 
139: ### 3) Run Frontend
140: 
141: Mo terminal khac, chay:
142: 
143: ```powershell
144: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\frontend\web"
145: pnpm install
146: pnpm dev
147: ```
148: 
149: Mo trinh duyet:
150: - Frontend home: http://localhost:3000
151: - Frontend health page: http://localhost:3000/health
152: - Frontend login page: http://localhost:3000/login
153: - Frontend register page: http://localhost:3000/register
154: - Frontend dashboard (protected): http://localhost:3000/dashboard
155: - Frontend receipt upload: http://localhost:3000/receipts/upload
156: - Backend API docs: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
157: 
158: ### 4) Run Worker
159: 
160: Can Redis chay tai `localhost:6379`.
161: 
162: PowerShell:
163: 
164: ```powershell
165: Set-Location "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker"
166: python -m uv sync --all-groups
167: python -m uv run taskiq worker --app-dir "D:\VuLapTrinh2\Personal_Finance_Analyzer\backend\worker" worker_app:broker
168: ```
